'''R'kik D'nec''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]]<ref name="CCG" /> from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="CSWE Jawa" /> At some point by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> D'nec allegedly encountered a tribe of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]], a herd of angry [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]], and a raging [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]] in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]], and defeated all of them<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|193|D'nec, R'kik}}</ref> within [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], emerging from the Dune Sea with a bantha [[Tooth/Legends|tusk]] over his [[Limb/Legends|shoulder]].<ref name="CCG" /> For this alleged exploit, the Jawa was regarded as the "Hero of the Dune Sea." However, many suspected the legend grew in the telling.<ref name="CSWE" /> D'nec was also undefeated in the game of [[Dune Sea Sabacc]], with no witnesses to the contrary.<ref name="CCG2">{{CCG|set=Jabba's Palace Limited|cardname=Dune Sea Sabacc (Light)}}</ref> D'nec wore [[Color/Legends|brown]] Jawa [[Robe/Legends|robes]] and had yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
R'kik D'nec was first mentioned in [[1998]], on a couple of cards for the ''[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" /><ref name="CCG2" /> The image Decipher used to represent R'kik D'nec was an edited version of a [[:File:HetNkikwithotherJawa.jpg|production photo]] for scenes in [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|desert palace]] from [[1983]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] film. However, it is worth noting that the Jawa used to represent R'kik D'nec in the source image was identified as another character, [[Wittin/Legends|Wittin]], in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="CSWE Wittin">{{CSWECite|III|332|Wittin}}</ref>
